title: varnish bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[7.6.1-4]
- Resolves: RHEL-45756 - Varnish consumes significantly more memory
  under RHEL8/9

[7.6.1-3]
- Resolves: RHEL-89691 - varnish: request smuggling attacks (CVE-2025-47905)
full_text:
